name: Skillet Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large frypan about 20 minutes before serving.
2. Add the ingredients and cook over medium to low heat for about 15 minutes.
3. Stir often.
4. Cover the pan during the last 5 minutes of cooking time.
5. Stir once or twice.
6. Serve immediately. (The vegetables will be crisp.)
